name: Holybro Tekko32 50A 4-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5x30.5 (F4 MCU)
description: The HGLRC Tekko32 F4 ESC delivers reliable 50A continuous (60A burst) power per channel for 4–6S setups.

name: HGLRC 60A V1 2-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5x30.5
description: The HGLRC 60A V1 ESC is a compact 4-in-1 speed controller built for reliable 2–6S performance.

name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A AM32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A AM32 is the first 4-in-1 ESC on the market to adapt the fast F4 MCU. Updated to run on open-source AM32 firmware, it offers enhanced control and quick response.

name: FETtec SFOC 50A 2-8S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The FETtec SFOC 50A 4-in-1 ESC (Simplified Field Oriented Control) is an innovative approach to control brushless three-phase motors.

name: Lumenier Mini Razor Pro 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Lumenier Mini Razor Pro AM32 ESC features a future-proof, powerful F3 processor.

name: Orqa 3030 70A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - NDAA
description: Get ready to take your drone’s performance to new heights with the state-of-the-art Orqa 3030 70A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC.

name: iFlight Borg 60RS 60A 4-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: Experience enhanced reliability and performance with the iFlight Borg 60RS 60A 4-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, tailored for the demands of competitive racing.

name: Lumenier Siege 80A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - NDAA
description: The Lumenier Siege 80A ESC features some of the latest technology in power electronics, including best-in-class power transistors.

name: HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20 is designed for pilots who demand both power and reliability.

name: Hobbywing XRotor G2 Micro 65A 6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The HOBBYWING XRotor FPV G2 65A 4-in-1 ESC is a high-performance power system for FPV racing drones, now upgraded with open-source AM32 firmware for faster updates, expanded features, and enhanced stability over BLHeli-32.

name: XILO Stax V3 F4 50A AM32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The XILO Stax V3 4-in-1 50A 3-6S AM32 ESC is fully plug-and-play with the XILO Stax FC, ensuring seamless integration. Now featuring an upgraded F4 processor, AM32 firmware, and increased amperage for enhanced performance.

name: TBS Lucid 90A 3-12S AM32 ESC - NDAA
description: The NDAA Version of the TBS Lucid 12S ESC is built for high-voltage, high-power applications where reliability is non-negotiable.

name: Darwinfpv Cement 100A 3 8S 32Bit Esc
description: Introducing Darwin FPV's "Cement" ESC: the ultimate solution for professional pilots, addressing the reliability issues of FPV drones.

name: Lumenier ELITE PRO 100A V2 6-12S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Lumenier ELITE PRO 100A V2 12S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC is a powerful and professional grade ESC with the latest BLHeli_32 + telemetry and current sensor, which is capable of driving large brushless drone motors for commercial applications.

name: TBS Lucid 60A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - Gorilla 39x16
description: The TBS Lucid ESC is TBS's latest engineering feat, designed for racing and freestyle. It features an 8-layer high-current-density board with double the market average capacitance, ensuring durability in intense FPV flying.

name: Aikon AK32Pro II 50A 2-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Aikon AK32Pro II 4-in-1 50A 6S continues Aikon’s pursuit of excellence! This new ESC combines the latest forward-looking capabilities with an L4-based processor and dual MOSFET packages.

name: Zeez 45A 2020 V3 3S-6S BLHELI32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The ZEEZ 45A 4-in-1 ESC comes with the fastest MCU available which is fully supported by BLHELI32 and STM32G0.

name: TBS Lucid 60A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - NDAA
description: Engineered for peak performance, the NDAA Version of the TBS Lucid 60A 4-in-1 ESC is designed to satisfy both seasoned pilots and ambitious newcomers.

name: Lumenier ELITE PRO 60A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The Lumenier ELITE PRO 60A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC delivers maximum power and efficiency for Cinelifters, large drones, and high-speed racing builds, supporting up to 60A per channel on 2-6S LiPo batteries.

name: Skystars KO25 25A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The Skystars Skystars KO25 25A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC comes with BLHeli_S firmware, supports DShot DShot300/600 and this ESC is a cost-effective solution for your quad!

name: HAKRC AIO Board - Brushless F722 FC + 40A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC w/ External USB
description: This HAKRC AIO Board features a brushless F722 flight controller and a 40A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC. This version carries an external USB. This is an ultra-light 7g brushless AIO flight controller!! This FC has a strong performance and can handle 40A continuous current and up to 6S.

name: SkyStars KRAMAM 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The SkyStars KRAMAM 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern.

name: HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20 is designed for pilots who demand both power and reliability.

name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Lite 1S Whoop Flight Controller - Frsky
description: The Happymodel CrazyBee F4 Lite Flight Controller brings lots of power in a small package. This 4-in-1 FC comes with an integrated receiver (FrSky), ESC, and an onboard 5.8GHz VTX!

name: Skystars KM55 55A AM32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The Skystars KM55 55A AM_32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 20x20mm mounting pattern. Supports Dshot 600/1200, telemetry functions (including voltage, RPMS & current ), and includes the latest AM_32 firmware.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F4 V1.2 3-6S BHeli_32 4-in-1 128K ESC - 45A
description: The Foxeer Reaper F4 Mini 128K is the next evolution of the Reaper ESC series. With its low heat generation and high-quality mosfets, this new version has a smoother flight, with fewer desyncs.

name: iFlight BLITZ E80 Pro G2 80A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC w/ Cover - 35x35/30x30
description: The iFlight BLITZ E80 uses a MOSFET PSMN1R0-40YLD, which can withstand a continuous current of 80A at 25°C, with a maximum power dissipation of 198W.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F4 V1.2 3-8S BHeli_32 4-in-1 128K ESC - 60A
description: The Foxeer Reaper F4 Mini V1.1 ESC is the next evolution of the Reaper ESC series. With its low heat generation and high-quality mosfets, this new version has a smoother flight, with fewer desyncs.

name: TBS Lucid 60A 8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The TBS Lucid 60A 8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC is the latest in product engineering at TBS. Built for racing and freestyle applications and developed to cater to the needs of both seasoned pilots and enthusiastic newcomers.

name: NewBeeDrone Infinity 200 V2 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC w/ Heatsink - 20x20
description: The NewBeeDrone Infinity 200 V2 is a 55A 3-6s BLHeli_32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC that has been upgraded to include a full aluminum shield for complete coverage.

name: T-Motor P60A V2 3-6S Dshot2400 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 128K ESC - 30.5x30.5
description: The T-Motor P60A V2 is a powerful 3-6S 4-in-1 128K ESC with 128K PWM and BLHeli_32 firmware that supports Dshot2400.

name: Axisflying Argus Pro 65A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC w/ Aluminum Box - 30x30
description: The Axisflying Argus Pro 65A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30 is a high-performance electronic speed controller designed for multirotor FPV drones.

name: Axisflying Argus Pro 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC w/ Aluminum Box - 30x30
description: The Axisflying Argus Pro 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30 is a high-performance electronic speed controller designed for multirotor FPV drones.

name: FETtec 65A 3-8S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The FETtec 65A 3-8S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30 features high quality 40V MOSFETs, 128 kHz Motor PWM, automatic input signal detection, KISS FC passthrough and Betaflight Passthrough.

name: RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE 60A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - Extreme Edition 128K
description: The RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE 60A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - Extreme Edition 128K can handle extreme speed and provides powerful torque even at low throttle.

name: T-Motor F66A Mini 66A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-In-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The T-Motor F66A Mini 66A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-In-1 ESC - 20x20 features double-sided heatsinks design for higher peak current.

name: JHEMCU BS 40A BLHeli_S 2-6S ESC - 30x30
description: The JHEMCU BS 40A 2-6S ESC features BLHeli_S firmware and a 30x30 mounting pattern.

name: Skystars KRAMAM KM35 PRO 35A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The Skystars KRAMAM KM35 PRO 35A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 20x20mm mounting pattern. Combined with Blheli_32  firmware to make a smooth ESC.

name: SpeedyBee 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The SpeedyBee 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30 features a TVS diode, which protects the board from voltage spikes.

name: RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - Extreme Edition 96K
description: The RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - Extreme Edition 96K can handle extreme speed and provides powerful torque even at low throttle.

name: RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE Mini 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - Racing Edition - 20x20
description: The RUSHFPV 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 Racing ESC fits into a narrow frame space thanks to a 15% reduction in volume!

name: Zeez 55A 3030 V3 3S-6S BLHELI32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The ZEEZ 55A 4-in-1 ESC comes with the fastest MCU available, which is fully supported by BLHELI32 and STM32G0. It supports Bi-directional DSHOT, all digital protocols (DSHOT150, DSHOT300, DSHOT600) out of the box, and many other things!

name: T-Motor VELOX Lite V45A 3-6S BLHeliS 4-in-1 ESC
description: The VELOX Lite V45A 3-6S BLHeliS 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is a lightweight and budget-friendly 4-in-1 ESC with great performance.

name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 BigFET 50A 4-in-1 ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The Tekko32 F4 BigFET 50A ESC is made for those that use a 20x20 mount and also need the power of a big MOSFET.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 128K 3-8S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A
description: The Foxeer Reaper Mini 128K 4-in-1 ESC is a 60A ESC designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight.

name: HGLRC Zeus 50A Pro 3-8S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The HGLRC Zeus 50A Pro is a 4-in-1 ESC featuring BLHeli_S firmware and a 3-8S input voltage. All of this power is packed into a large MOSFET mini-sized 20x20 board that is ideal for FPV freestyle  and racing!

name: JHEMCU AIO Board - GSF405A F4 FC + 5A 1-2S ESC w/ Built-in ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
description: The JHEMCU GS405A AIO features an F4 FC and a 5A ESC with built-in ELRS 2.4GHz receiver. This is an ultra-light 3.3g brushless AIO flight controller with 25.5x25.5mm mounting pattern!! This FC can handle 5A of continuous current and up to 2S.

name: Skystars KRAMAM 50A Pro 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The SkyStars KRAMAM 50A Pro 3-6S AM_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern. Combined with AM_32  firmware to make a smooth ESC.

name: Diatone Mamba Mini 128K 6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F40 40A
description: The Diatone Mamba Mini F40 40A ESC brings BIG power all in a 20x20 mounting size! This ESC can push 40A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

name: Diatone Mamba 128K 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F65 65A
description: The Diatone Mamba F65 65A ESC brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This ESC can push 65A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

name: Diatone Mamba 128K 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F45 45A
description: The Diatone Mamba F45 45A ESC brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This ESC can push 45A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

name: Diatone Mamba 128K 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F55 55A
description: The Diatone Mamba F55 55A ESC brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This ESC can push 55A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

name: Diatone Mamba F55 55A 6S BLS 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Diatone Mamba F55_BLS 6S 4-in-1 is a 30x30 ESC that provides a high-power BLS in a small, but easy-to-install package. This 4-in-1 ESC is capable of supporting high power builds up to 6S.

name: T-Motor VELOX V50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Velox V50A 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is the ultimate ESC for your build. Adopting the QN3109 1.5 MOS, the V50A has been upgraded with an 18% performance increase to fly in confidence even during high-current spikes.

name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The all-new Tekko32 Metal is the first 4-in1- ESC in the market to adapt to the fast F4 MCU. Powerful & reliable metal-cased MOSFET 4-in-1 ESC with smooth control and quick response.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 96K 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A
description: Foxeer Reaper Mini 96K 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 96K 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A/60A
description: The Foxeer Reaper Mini 96K BL32 4-in-1 ESC is designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight. Available in 45A or 60A.

name: Lumenier ELITE PRO 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 60A
description: The Lumenier Elite Pro 60A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC is a powerful ESC with the latest BLHeli_32 + telemetry and current sensor. The double heatsink design provides excellent cooling required for high power setups often required in Cinema and heavy-lift drones.

name: iFlight Beast F7 V2 55A AIO 25.5x25.5mm Flight Controller
description: The Beast F7 55A AIO V2 FC is iFlight's new innovation! The new Beast series of AIO FCs combines MCU speed with ESC for a bigger stack!

name: Diatone Mamba F40 40A 6S BLS 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Diatone Mamba F40_BLS 6S 4-in-1 is a 30x30 ESC that provides a high-power BLS in a small, but easy-to-install package. This MINI 4-in-1 ESC is capable of supporting high power builds up to 6S.

name: Diatone Mamba MINI F40 40A BLS Dshot600 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Diatone Mamba F40_BLS MINI Dshot600 4-in-1 is a 20x20 ESC that provides a high-power BLS in a small, but easy-to-install package. Recommended for 3", 4" and 5" ultralight builds!

name: Foxeer Reaper FPV 3-8S 65A BLHeli_32 30x30 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Foxeer Reaper FPV is a 65A BL32 4-in-1 ESC designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight.

name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 45A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 25A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 25A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro Combo Stack - F7 FC + 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC
description: The XRotor Micro Combo from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration. The Micro Combo features a 60A 4-in-1 ESC along with an updated F7 Flight Controller. This new FC is similar to other versions with its OSD, and voltage monitoring, but the F7 now comes with an all-new 5V & 12V dual BEC Circuit and a special interface for the DJI image transmission system.

name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 FC + 50A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC
description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 Flight Controller + ESC is DJI HD system ready with an onboard 9v regulator to power the DJI Air Unit in a simple plug-and-play configuration.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A/60A
description: The Foxeer Reaper Mini BL32 4-in-1 ESC is designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight. Available in 45A or 60A.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A
description: Foxeer Reaper Mini 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A

name: Skystars 4-in-1 3-6S 30x30 ESC - BLHeli_32 45A/60A
description: The Skystars KO series BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESCs have a 6-layer design and over-current capabilities. And with BLHeli_32 firmware, you won't be bottlenecked by your ESC.

name: T-Motor P50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Limited Edition)
description: The P50A 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is inspired by the PACER P2208 Motors!

name: NewBeeDrone Infinity305 45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 30x30 ESC
description: The NewBeeDrone Infinity305 ESC is a solid 30.5x30.5 ESC that is also plug-and-play with the DJI Digital FPV System!

name: Spedix IS40 40A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Spedix IS40 40A 4-in-1 20x20 ESC (3-6S) is one of the most reliable 20mm ESCs in the market and can support up to 6S racing drones!

name: Flycolor X-Cross Mini 45A 3-6S BL_Heli32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC
description: This FLYCOLOR X-Cross Mini is a 4-in-1 ESC was designed for high-stress racing drones. The reduced impedance and high-quality MOSFET allow for high-current to effortlessly flow through to your motors.

name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A
description: Foxeer Reaper Mini 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A

name: T-Motor Velox V2 V45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The V45A 4-in-1 ESC V2 by T-Motor is inspired by the VELOX V2207 and V2306 Motors! The V45A V2 MOS has been upgraded with a 15% performance increase to fly in confidence even during high-current spikes.

name: SkyStars KRAMAM Turbo2020 KM45 45A BLHeli_32 3-6S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
description: The SkyStars KRAMAM Turbo2020 KM45 45A 4-in-1 ESC features BLHeli_32, Dshot 600/1200, 20x20 mounting holes, supports telemetry functions (including voltage, RPMS & current ), and other cool features!

name: SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 + KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
description: The SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 Fly Stack comes with the SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller and  KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, to give your multirotor full power!

name: SkyStars Fly Tower Mini Stack - F7 HD FC+ KM40 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 Fly Stack comes with the SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller and  KM40 40A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, to give your multirotor full power!

name: SkyStars KM35 35A BLHeli_S 3-6S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
description: The SkyStars KM35 35A  3-6S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC features BLHeli_S, Dshot 300/600, 20X20 mounting holes, excellent over-current capability, better control performance and supports 6S Lipo batteries!

name: T-Motor Mini F45A 3-6S 32-Bit 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
description: The T-Motor Mini F45A 6S is a 4-in-1 ESC that comes with a 20x20 mounting pattern and 32-BIT for high performance and fast response!

name: JHEMCU GHF411 Pro 35A BLHELI_S 3-6S AIO Whoop Flight Controller
description: The JHEMCU GH411 35A FC is a new ultra-light 7.3g brushless AIO flight controller!

name: Zeez Design 2020 45A 3-6S BlHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Zeez Design 2020 45A 3-6S BlHeli32 4-in-1 ESC supports up to 6S input, and it features STM32L4 MCU, supports BlHeli32 firmware, Dshot150, Dhsot300, Dshot600, ProShot 1000 among many cool features!

name: DYS 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S DShot 4-in-1 ESC
description: The DYS 45A 4-in-1 ESC is an ideal choice for an ESC platform where build space is at a premium! This 45A ESC supports DShot 150,300 and 600, Oneshot125, Oneshot42, and Multishot protocols.

name: V-Good RC AIO Flight Controller (F7, OSD, 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC, BEC, Curr, DJI, Black Box)
description: The V-Good RC AIO Flight Controller comes F7, OSD, 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC, BEC, Curr, DJI, Black Box, and many other cool features all-in-1 board!

name: HGLRC Sector 5 V3 HD Freestyle FPV Racing Drone PNP with GPS - 4S
description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

name: HGLRC Sector 5 V3 HD Freestyle FPV Racing Drone PNP with GPS - 6S
description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

name: RushFPV RUSH BLADE F722 FC & 50A 30x30 & RUSH Tank Ⅱ VTX & RUSH PFB Stack/Combo
description: The RUSH BLADE F722 Stack for analog by RUSHFPV features the RUSH TANK II 5.8GHz VTX, RUSH BLADE F722 Flight Controller, RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Sports Edition), and the RUSH Power Filter Board (PFB), which can handle up to 6S input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max.

name: RushFPV RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - Sport Edition
description: The RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC Sport's Edition by RUSHFPV features, front & back special process aluminum shell, F051 MCU 48MHZ with BLHeli_32 Firmware, 48K PWM FREQ. 3oz dual board and 40V rated MOSFET.

name: Aikon AK32PIN 20x20 4-in-1 35A 6S BLHeli32 ESC - V2
description: The Aikon AK32 V2 35A 4IN1 BLHeli32 comes with the STM32F051 microprocessor with the latest BLHeli_32 firmware. This is V2 with the aluminum heatsink.

name: JHEMCU 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The JHEMCU BLheli 32 55A 4-in-1 ESC uses 32-bit ARM Cortex MCU STM32F051 48MHZ processor, 2048-level throttle resolution, unique algorithm control, and strong anti-interference ability.

name: HIFIONRC F7 2-6S 25A AIO FC + ESC Toothpick Flight Controller
description: This AIO board managed to fit an F7 FC along with a 25A ESC that supports up to 6S lipos!

name: HIFIONRC F7 2-6S 45A AIO FC + ESC Toothpick Flight Controller
description: This AIO board managed to fit an F7 FC along with a 45A ESC that supports up to 6S lipos!

name: SkyStars KRAMAM 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The SkyStars KRAMAM 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern.

name: SkyStars Turbo2020 KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The SkyStars KRAMAM Mini 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 20x20mm mounting pattern.

name: Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate + Razor LED 55A Bundle (F7 FC, 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC)
description: The Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate + Razor LED 55A Stack (F7 FC, 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC) Combo. Save 5% when buying this as a bundle!

name: T-Motor Mini F45A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The T-Motor Mini F45A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC is loaded with lots of power, all in a 20x20 ESC!

name: T-Motor Cinematic F30A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The T-Motor Cinematic F30A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC is loaded with lots of power, all in a 20x20 ESC!

name: T-Motor Mini F7  Stack + F45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: Get a better flying experience with the T-Motor Mini F45 + Mini F7 Stack! This stack brings lots of power all in a small package!

name: HGLRC Forward 60A 3-6S BLHeil32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The HGLRC Forward 60A 3-6S F3 BLHeil32 4-in-1 ESC is a high-performance ESC that comes with a brand new CPU (STM32F051), supports DSHOT1200/600/300/150.ONESHOT125/42 and has a running frequency up to 48MHZ.

name: FETtec 35A V1.1 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: This FETtec 6S capable 4-in-1 ESC features KISS FC passthrough and fits on 20x20 mounting holes. Lots of capability in this tiny ESC!

name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 2-4S AIO Flight Controller - Frsky
description: The Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 AIO FC is perfect for the Larva-X and Mobula6 Whoops! This FC features D8/D16 switchable, compatible with non-EU transmitter (both D8 and D16 mode) and no ground interference from the transmitter and the receiver.

name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 2-4S AIO Flight Controller - Flysky
description: The Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 AIO FC is perfect for the Larva-X and Mobula6 Whoops! This FC features AFHDS and AFHDS-2A switchable, failsafe support, and no ground interference from the transmitter and the receiver.

name: Lumenier Razor LED 55A 4-in-1 F3 BLHeli_32 2-6s ESC
description: The Lumenier Razor LED 55A 4in1 F3 BLHeli_32 2-6s ESC. A robust ESC with onboard RBG LEDs and a pre-programmed LED controller with easy-press button, plus PDB to power and control 4x additional arm LEDs.

name: BETAFPV Beta85X for GoPro - PNP
description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

name: Flywoo GOKU 406S 40A BLHeli_32 2-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Flywoo GOKU 406S 40A 4-in-1 ESC brings serious power in a 20x20 game! Stackable with other mini FC's like the GOKU F722 Mini F7 Flight Controller.

name: T-Motor P50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The P50A 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is inspired by the PACER P2208 Motors!

name: HAKRC 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The HAKRC 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC provides great power and value in a 20x20mm/30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern.

name: FPVCrate Crater 46A 3-6S BLHeliSuite32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The FPVCrate Crater 46 ESC has a constant current rating of 46 amps. This means that this ESC can withstand and deliver 46 amps without overheating.

name: Diatone Mamba F405 DJI Stack - F50PRO HV 50A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Mamba F405 DJI + F50PRO 50A Stack from Diatone brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This stack can push 50A all while bringing you the latest features!

name: Lumenier Elite 60A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Lumenier Elite 60A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC. A powerful ESC with the latest BLHeli_32 + telemetry and current sensor and capable of 60A current support on up to 6s!

name: T-Motor F7 Stack - F7 FC + F55A PRO II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: T-Motor's powerful F7 Flight Controller combined with the F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance and seamless integration in your electronics stack.

name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (45A 2-6S Pro ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (30A 2-6S ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

name: BETAFPV Beta85X for GoPro - DSMX
description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

name: BETAFPV Beta85X for GoPro - Crossfire
description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

name: Spedix GS40F 40A 3-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 Mini ESC
description: Spedix GS40F Mini is an reliable 20x20mm 6S 4-In-1 ESC.

name: T-Motor F4 Stack - F4 FC, F45A V2 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-In-1 ESC Combo
description: T-Motor's well-designed F4 Flight Controller combined with the F45A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance - using the included 10pin cable for solderless installation and ultra-low stack height.

name: T-Motor F4 Stack - F4 FC, F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC Combo
description: T-Motor's well-designed F4 Flight Controler combined with the F55A PRO II 55A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC will give you an experience!

name: Spedix IS35 2-5S 35A 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
description: The IS35 is a new 35A 4-in-1 ESC featuring BLHeli_S and current monitoring.

name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro 60A 6S 4-in-1 BLHeli32 ESC
description: Hobbywing's XRotor 60A 4-in-1 ESC raises the bar for ESCs. Hobbywing electronics are rock solid and the 60A ESC is no exception. Extra focus was put into this ESC to make it extremely reliable for any setup you are running.

name: Spedix GS45 45A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The GS45 iterates on the previous GS40 ESC from Spedix. The GS45 adds a bit more headroom to the power output, improves the heatsink design, optimizes the layout, and even adds a 10V 2A BEC.

name: XILO Stax Combo - F4 Flight Controller + 45A BLHeli_32 6s 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Stax Combo by XILO is a high performance F4 Flight Controller paired with a 45A 32bit 6s 4-in-1 ESC. The plug and play connection makes it easy to install and use on your favorite airframe

name: iFlight SucceX Mini F4 V2 + 35A 2-6S BLHeli32 Fly Tower Stack
description: This stack includes the advanced SucceX Mini F4 V2.1 Flight Controller along with the SucceX 35A V2 4-in-1 ESC, which can handle up to 6s input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max.

name: Holybro Tekko32 F3 Metal 65A 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Holybro Tekko32 BLHeli32 Metal ESC with F3 MCU is a 4-in-1 ESC with metal cased MOSFETs. Using metal case MOSFETs result in better heat dissipation.

name: T-Motor F55A Pro 55A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description:
New version available - https://www.getfpv.com/t-motor-f55a-pro-ii-55a-3-6s-blheli32-4-in-1-esc-w-bec.html

The T-Motor F55A 4-in-1 ESC is fully capable of pushing 6s with 75A burst and a sustained 55A current draw. Equipped with the latest in ESC technology such as 32-bit capability and BLHeli32 firmware.

name: DALRC Rocket 45A 3-6s BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: DALRC is back with another great 4-in-1 ESC, the Rocket! This time, supporting up to 45A of power!

name: Spedix GS40 40A 2-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: Reliable and high-performance 32 bit 4-in-1 ESC from Spedix.

name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro 45A 6S 4-in-1 ESC Dshot1200
description: The Hobbywing Xrotor Micro 45A 6S 4 in 1 ESC Dshot1200

name: Spedix GS25 25A 4-in-1 2-4s BLHeli_32 Dshot ESC
description: Reliable and high-performance 32 bit 4-in-1 ESC from Spedix.

name: Racerstar Special Anniversary Edition 35A BLheli_S 4-in-1 ESC
description: Racerstar has released this ESC for their 11th Anniversary. Equipped with BLheli_S, Dshot600, PWM/OneShot/MultiShot, and a current sensor, this 4-in-1 ESC is ready to power your drone on the cheap.

name: FlightOne SKITZO Spark32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The FlightOne Spark32 4-in-1 electronic speed controller (ESC) provides the power of BlHeli_32 performance in a tiny package. This makes your electronic stack small, and generally eliminates the need for an additional PDB. The Spark32 4n1 ESC performs great, helps clean up any build, and is perfect for your 3″ or 5″+ build.

name: FlightOne SKITZO Spark V2 4-in-1 ESC
description: The FlightOne Spark 4-in-1 electronic speed controller (ESC) provides the power of BlHeli_S performance in a tiny package.

name: Spedix GS35 35A 4-in-1 2-4s BLHeli_32 Dshot ESC
description: Reliable and high-performance 32 bit 4-in-1 ESC from Spedix.

name: DYS F30A 4-in-1 ESC BLHeli_S Dshot
description: The DYS F30A 4-in-1 ESC BLHeli_S Dshot.

name: Lumenier BLHeli_S 35A 4-in-1 12v / 5v BEC DSHOT ESC +Current Sensor
description: A 4 in 1 version of Lumenier's 35A Blheli_S  ESC with 12v/5v BEC, Current and Voltage Sensor. Advanced ESC with BB2 chip, perfect for compact builds.

name: V-Good RC ARM A32 ESC Program Card V4.0 w/ LED
description: The V-Good RC ARM A32 ESC Program Card V4.0 helps you adjust various settings of your ESC. This V4.0 updated version features a new software structure that reduces burn rate along with energy saving, bideriection, and better motor compatibility.

name: Skystars 4-in-1 3-6S 30x30 ESC - BLHeli_S KO55II 55A
description: The Skystars KO55II BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC has a 6-layer design and over-current capabilities. With BLHeli_S firmware, this ESC is a cost-effective solution for your quad.

name: KISS FC V2 - 32bit Flight Controller
description: Get top performance in a simplified package with the Kiss 32bit Flight Controller V2 with onboard F7 chip.

name: KISS 2-5S 25A (40A limit) 32bit 4-in-1 ESC
description: The KISS ESC25A 4-in-1 powered by an M4 MCU is the latest member of the KISS family, designed for racing quads with demanding motors.

name: FETtec 45A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The FETtec 45A 3-6S ESC is a powerful 4-in-1 electronic speed controller that has a mounting pattern of 30.5x30.5 and supports Dshot 300-2400, OneShot 42/125, PWM, Crossfire, SBUS, and other features!

name: HIFIONRC 60A 3-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: HIFIONRC's 60A 4-in-1 ESC is capable of supporting high powered builds at up to 6S.

name: Lumenier Mini Razor Pro 4in1 20x20 F3 BLHeli_32 45A 2-6s ESC
description: The Mini Razor Pro 45A 4in1 ESC was designed for the drone pilot who loves the tiny 20x20 form factor but also wants to squeeze out every ounce of juice out of their equipment as possible.

name: Heatsink for Typhoon32 V2
description: Custom GetFPV heatsink for the Airbot Typhoon32 ESC.

name: Flycolor X-Tower F4 FC + 40A BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
description: The Flycolor F4 40A Stack gives you all the essentials you need to get in the air and fly with the best components.

name: FlightOne AfterBurner 50A 4-in-1 ESC
description: The AfterBurner ESC is the first ESC from FlightOne made to be used in either 30x30 or 20x20 quads, capable of 50A per channel or higher.

name: HAKRC 35A 2-6S BLHeli_S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
description: The HAKRC 35A 2-6S BLHeli_S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC provides great power and value in a 20x20mm mounting pattern.

name: Skystars 4-in-1 3-6S 30x30 ESC - BLHeli_S KO45 45A
description: The Skystars KO45 BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC has a 6-layer design and over-current capabilities. With BLHeli_S firmware, this ESC is a cost-effective solution for your quad.

name: Flycolor X-Cross 60A 3-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Flycolor X-Cross 60A 4-in-1 ESC was made to satisfy power-hungry quads. With 60A of continuous current support, you will have plenty of headroom to push your rig to the limit.
